result:
Both files are created and validated:

**`summary.json`** — exactly the five required keys, all numbers computed from the CSV:
- Total revenue: $7,154.44 across 30 orders; median order value 204.94 (mean of the two middle values for the even count)
- Top product: Gadget ($2,392.00)
- Regional totals: North 2176.35, East 1830.79, South 1732.48, West 1414.82

**`REPORT.md`** — verified against every constraint:
- Exactly four `##` headings in the required order, no other headings
- 174 words total (limit 250)
- Overview states `$7,154.44` (correct comma/decimal format) and 30 orders
- Exactly three `- ` bullets in Recommendations, each under 25 words and tied to figures in the data
- None of the banned words appear anywhere

All revenue figures were computed with exact decimal arithmetic from `data/sales.csv` — no estimates.
